---
title: "People"
---

## Current members

<div class="card-grid">

<div class="person-card">
<img src="../assets/img/people/jane-doe.jpg" alt="Jane Doe">
<h3><a href="members/jane-doe/">Jane Doe</a></h3>
<p class="muted">PhD Student • Methane, inverse methods</p>
<p>
  <span class="badge">CH₄</span>
  <span class="badge">Inversions</span>
  <span class="badge">Python</span>
</p>
</div>

</div>

## Alumni
- *Add alumni here*
